context_for_next_testing_agent: Post-login animation flow: Login -> /welcome (animation plays ~6 seconds) -> /home. Animation uses justLoggedIn state in AuthProvider to trigger redirect to /welcome. clearJustLoggedIn() is called after animation completes. 3CX Call Recording placeholder implemented in all three CRM pages (Sales, CS, Mentor) with data-testid='call-recording-url', disabled input, 'Coming Soon' badge, and explanatory text.

features_verified.post_login_animation: Working - Animation plays on /welcome route for ~6 seconds
features_verified.animation_redirect: Working - Redirects to /home after animation completes
